name: stress-testing-boilerplate
description: K6 stress testing framework with real-time metrics dashboard

scripts.k6:vcontent:health:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=health -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:smoke:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=smoke -e VUS=2 -e DURATION=30s -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:load:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=load -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:stress:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=stress -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:soak:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e TEST_PHASE=soak -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:health:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=health -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:smoke:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=smoke -e VUS=2 -e DURATION=30s -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:load:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=load -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:stress:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=stress -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:soak:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e TEST_PHASE=soak -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run --out json=/app/results/output.json scripts/vcontent/main.js
